debug_info.goal:
d : Type u_4
inst✝¹ : Fintype d
inst✝ : DecidableEq d
ρ : MState d
ψ : Ket d
⊢ ρ.exp_val ↑(MState.pure ψ) = 1 ↔ ρ = MState.pure ψ

failed_attempts:
constructor
  · intro h
    have h1 : ρ.M = (MState.pure ψ).M := by
      have h2 : (ρ.M - (MState.pure ψ).M).inner (ρ.M - (MState.pure ψ).M) = 0 := by
        simp_all [MState.exp_val, HermitianMat.inner, Matrix.trace_mul_comm]
        nlinarith [ρ.trace_one, ρ.positive, MState.pure_mul_self ψ]
      exact HermitianMat.inner_eq_zero_iff.mp h2
    cases ρ
    cases ψ
    congr
    exact h1
  · rintro rfl
    simp [MState.exp_val, MState.pure_mul_self]

constructor <;> intro h <;> simp_all [MState.exp_val]
  <;> ext i j <;> simp_all [Matrix.mul_apply, Matrix.trace_apply, MState.pure_apply]

constructor
  · intro h
    have h₁ : ρ.m = (MState.pure ψ).m := by

      have h₂ : (ρ.m - (MState.pure ψ).m).inner (ρ.m - (MState.pure ψ).m) = 0 := by
        simp_all [MState.exp_val, HermitianMat.inner, Matrix.trace_mul_comm]
        nlinarith [ρ.zero_le, ρ.trace_one, MState.pure_mul_self ψ]
      have h₃ : ∀ A : Matrix d d ℂ, A.inner A = 0 → A = 0 := by
        intro A hA
        simp_all [HermitianMat.inner]
        exact Matrix.ext fun i j => by
          have : (A i j).re ^ 2 + (A i j).im ^ 2 = 0 := by
            simpa [Complex.normSq_apply] using hA
          simp_all
      exact sub_eq_zero.mp (h₃ _ h₂)
    cases ρ
    cases ψ
    congr
    exact h₁
  · rintro rfl
    simp [MState.exp_val, MState.pure_mul_self]
